blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Aye — you see her in the hall this morning?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: She walked past you between second and third. You didn't notice?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bro I noticed and she wasn't even looking at me. She was looking at you. You were the only one not paying attention.
This was the part I still hadn't figured out. Being in the same building as her now felt different. Like the space between us had a different weight than it used to.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: You gonna be like this all week?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Somewhere else in your head while standing right next to me.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Aight. I respect it. Just don't drop a pass because of it.

blocks.prompt: Jonathan says you're going to be somewhere else in your head all week.

options.label: "Probably. But I'll be there when it matters."
Say nothing. You're already somewhere else.
